headline: Stay informed with the top movers within the S&P500 index on Friday.
summary: Curious about the top performers within the S&P500 index one hour before the close of the markets on Friday? Dive into the list of today's session's top gainers and losers for a comprehensive overview.

headline: Alcohol's Growth Hangover Is Here — And This $60B Deal Proves It
summary: A potential $60B Pernod Ricard–Brown-Forman deal signals slowing demand plus rising pressure across alcohol stocks.
